description:
Trigger n8n workflows from a RocketRide pipeline or an agent.
As a pipeline step, lane input is POSTed to a workflow's webhook and the response flows downstream; as a tool, an agent can trigger workflows and inspect workflows/executions.
Self-hosted: configure the n8n base URL and (for listing/polling) a public API key.

apiKey.description: n8n public API key. Needed only to list/inspect workflows and poll executions — not for triggering webhooks.
apiKey.title: API Key (X-N8N-API-KEY)

asyncTimeout.description: Max seconds to wait for an async execution to finish before raising an error.
asyncTimeout.title: Async timeout (seconds)

baseUrl.description: Base URL of your n8n instance, e.g. http://localhost:5678 or https://n8n.example.com. If RocketRide runs in Docker, use http://host.docker.internal:5678 (or the n8n container name) — 'localhost' would point at the container.
baseUrl.title: n8n Base URL

mode.description: Sync requires the workflow to end in a 'Respond to Webhook' node. Async polls the execution via the public API (API key required).
mode.title: Result mode

payloadMode.description: How lane input is sent to the workflow. 'structured' preserves document boundaries + metadata; 'simple' (default) flattens to a single string for back-compat.
payloadMode.title: Payload shape (pipeline step)

readOnly.description: When ON, write operations (activate/deactivate workflow) are blocked.
readOnly.title: Read-only mode

syncTimeout.description: Max seconds to wait for the webhook response in sync mode (raise for slow workflows).
syncTimeout.title: Sync timeout (seconds)

verifyTls.description: Leave ON. Disable only for a self-signed local n8n served over HTTPS.
verifyTls.title: Verify TLS certificate

webhookAuth.description: Authentication on the workflow's Webhook node. Separate from the API key above.
webhookAuth.title: Webhook auth

webhookHeaderName.description: Header name (when Webhook auth = Header auth).
webhookHeaderName.title: Webhook header name

webhookHeaderValue.description: Header value (when Webhook auth = Header auth).
webhookHeaderValue.title: Webhook header value

webhookToken.description: Token sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' (when Webhook auth = Bearer token or JWT).
webhookToken.title: Webhook token (Bearer/JWT)

workflow.description: The webhook path the target workflow listens on (set on its Webhook node). Used by the pipeline step and as the default for the trigger tool.
workflow.title: Workflow (webhook path)

title: n8n
